title: 目標達成の後に・目指すはテッペンでい

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One has improved in leaps and bounds
during her junior year and has decided on a new
goal—to reach the top of both the regionals and
centrals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she isn't sure how to achieve that goal,
so I step forward and offer some advice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest she try to win the Tokyo Daishoten in
her classic year and follow it up with some central
G1 victories in her senior year in order to claim
the title of Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her path to the very top now mapped out,
we go on to set the Tokyo Daishoten as her first
race goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But before that, we decide to have her run in the
Japan Dirt Derby first, so she can familiarize
herself with Oi Racecourse.
